candidates.why: Direct match to total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing placeholder, but inferior to the explicit total current assets line.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported total for current assets.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of year
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash; useful cross-check but target is balance-sheet cash.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line as requested.

candidates.why: Direct match to total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Only a component and not the total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Best direct match to short-term debt/current portion of long-term debt, and explicitly excludes lease-related debt.
Could indicate current borrowing, but less precise and likely unnecessary if current portion debt line is available.
Candidate current financing liability, but the row appears blank and is less complete than the explicit current portion debt line.

variables.notes: R:c. Chose a label outside the shortlist because it is a cleaner exact match for non-lease short-term debt. Excluded lease-related rows per instructions.

candidates.why: Direct match to taxes payable/current tax liabilities payable.

variables.notes: Direct taxes payable/current tax liability line.

candidates.why: Direct total PPE line; preferred over gross/depreciation components and lease-related asset rows.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant and Equipment - Balancing value
candidates.why: Could represent net PPE, but the explicit PPE line is cleaner.

candidates.row_label: Accumulated Depreciation of Property, Plant and Equipment
candidates.why: Component of PPE, not the total asset amount.

variables.notes: Used the explicit reported PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Net cash generated from operating activities
candidates.why: Direct match to net cash flow from operating activities.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash generated from operating activities
